Welcome to MacClock

A native macOS desktop clock with weather, calendar, alarms, world clocks, news ticker, and rotating nature backgrounds.

This installer will place MacClock.app into your /Applications folder. After installation, launch it from Spotlight (⌘Space → MacClock) or from the Applications folder.

System requirement: macOS 14 (Sonoma) or later.

MacClock is signed with an ad-hoc identity (no paid Apple Developer ID). The installer strips the macOS quarantine attribute as part of installation so the app launches without Gatekeeper friction.
